title: Timing and Spacing of Immunobiologics | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
(c) The duration of interference of antibody-containing products with the immune response to the measles component of measles-containing vaccine, and possibly varicella vaccine, is dose related (see Table 3-6).
